title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at Atos India

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at Atos India
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Atos India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Software Engineer to strengthen our Bhubaneswar-based team.

About Atos India:
Atos India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in MongoDB

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Atos India!
jsonLd.skills: TypeScript, Java, Machine Learning, Docker, Kubernetes, Python, AWS, MongoDB
